ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offenders" (
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offender */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the offender */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the offender */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the offender */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the offender */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the offender */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the offender */,
  "age_cat" TEXT /* Age category of the offender */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the offender */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the offender */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the offender */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the offender */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the offender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender being assessed */,
  "type_of_assessment" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Risk of Recidivism, Risk of Violence) */,
  "decile_score" INTEGER /* Decile score of the assessment */,
  "score_text" TEXT /* Text description of the assessment score */,
  "screening_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to administer the assessment */,
  "assessment_administrator" TEXT /* Administrator of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender being charged */,
  "c_case_number" TEXT /* Case number of the charge */,
  "c_charge_degree" TEXT /* Degree of the charge (e.g., F3, M1) */,
  "c_charge_desc" TEXT /* Description of the charge */,
  "c_offense_date" TEXT /* Date of the offense */,
  "c_arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of the arrest */,
  "charge_status" TEXT /* Status of the charge (e.g., Pending, Convicted, Dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jail_movements" (
  "jail_movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jail movement */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender being moved */,
  "c_jail_in" TEXT /* Date and time of jail entry */,
  "c_jail_out" TEXT /* Date and time of jail exit */,
  "r_jail_in" TEXT /* Date and time of rearrest */,
  "r_jail_out" TEXT /* Date and time of rearrest exit */,
  "jail_facility" TEXT /* Facility where the offender was moved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jail_movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jail_movements_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recidivism" (
  "recidivism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recidivism event */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender who recidivated */,
  "is_recid" INTEGER /* Indicator of recidivism (True or False) */,
  "r_case_number" TEXT /* Case number of the recidivism event */,
  "r_charge_degree" TEXT /* Degree of the recidivism charge */,
  "r_days_from_arrest" INTEGER /* Days from arrest to recidivism */,
  "r_offense_date" TEXT /* Date of the recidivism offense */,
  "r_charge_desc" TEXT /* Description of the recidivism charge */,
  "recidivism_type" TEXT /* Type of recidivism (e.g., Technical, New Crime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recidivism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recidivism_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priors" (
  "prior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prior offense */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender with prior offenses */,
  "priors_count" INTEGER /* Number of prior offenses */,
  "prior_charge_degree" TEXT /* Degree of the prior charge */,
  "prior_charge_desc" TEXT /* Description of the prior charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_priors_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "juvenile_offenses" (
  "juvenile_offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each juvenile offense */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender with juvenile offenses */,
  "juv_fel_count" INTEGER /* Number of juvenile felony offenses */,
  "juv_misd_count" INTEGER /* Number of juvenile misdemeanor offenses */,
  "juv_other_count" INTEGER /* Number of other juvenile offenses */,
  "juvenile_charge_desc" TEXT /* Description of the juvenile charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("juvenile_offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_juvenile_offenses_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violence_assessments" (
  "violence_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violence assessment */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender being assessed */,
  "vr_case_number" TEXT /* Case number of the violence assessment */,
  "vr_charge_degree" TEXT /* Degree of the violence charge */,
  "vr_offense_date" TEXT /* Date of the violence offense */,
  "vr_charge_desc" TEXT /* Description of the violence charge */,
  "assessment_score" INTEGER /* Score of the violence assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violence_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violence_assessments_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custody" (
  "custody_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custody event */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender in custody */,
  "in_custody" TEXT /* Date of custody entry */,
  "out_custody" TEXT /* Date of custody exit */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start of the custody period */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End of the custody period */,
  "custody_type" TEXT /* Type of custody (e.g., Jail, Prison) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custody_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custody_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender associated with the event */,
  "event" INTEGER /* Type of event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Arrest, Conviction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, policymaker) */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of login */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date and time of logout */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Web, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
